raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general reaction to the draft centrally includes checking whether the stated interpretation follows coherently from the reported results.","R1.3":"The artifact reports quantitative results and then makes performance claims, so verifying whether those claims match the numbers is load-bearing.","RX.1":"Any projection of an open-ended opinion request should preserve uncertainty about unstated evaluation criteria and unavailable external context.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong comparative claims, making avoidance of overclaiming central to the requested assessment responsibility.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within assessing the draft rather than editing, rewriting, or executing the delegation.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns evaluation methodology, misleading endorsement could propagate downstream research or benchmarking harm.","RX.5":"Assessment should remain traceable to the artifact's reported figures and claims rather than unsupported assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general reaction to the draft centrally includes checking whether the stated interpretation follows coherently from the reported results.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact reports quantitative results and then makes performance claims, so verifying whether those claims match the numbers is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of an open-ended opinion request should preserve uncertainty about unstated evaluation criteria and unavailable external context.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong comparative claims, making avoidance of overclaiming central to the requested assessment responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within assessing the draft rather than editing, rewriting, or executing the delegation.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns evaluation methodology, misleading endorsement could propagate downstream research or benchmarking harm.
rationale.RX.5: Assessment should remain traceable to the artifact's reported figures and claims rather than unsupported assumptions.
